news.title: S&P 500 falls as Microsoft dives 11%, software stocks tumble: Live updates
news.summary: Related-company context for MSFT via ORCL: "Magnificent Seven" companies Meta Platforms, Microsoft and Tesla posted earnings results after Wednesday's close.

news.title: Microsoft can monetize AI better than any software company, says Jefferies' Brent Thill
news.summary: Related-company context for MSFT via ORCL: Brent Thill, Jefferies, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk Microsoft and Meta quarterly results.

news.title: Stocks to Watch Wednesday Recap: Amazon, Nvidia,  Deutsche Bank
news.summary: Related-company context for MSFT via AMZN: ↗️ Nvidia (NVDA): China has approved purchases of Nvidia’s popular H200 chip for the first time, giving authorization to several customers, including Alibaba (BABA, HK:9988). Nvidia and Alibaba shares rose.

news.title: Microsoft earnings call: CFO on 'great partnership' with OpenAI
news.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) reported second quarter results, with adjusted earnings of $5.16 per share and revenue figures ($81.27 billion vs. estimates of $80.31 billion) that topped Wall Street expectations.On Wednesday's earnings call, Microsoft CFO Amy Hood chats with Jefferies analyst Brent Thill about the company's partnership with OpenAI (OPAI.PVT).Watch the video above to hear more.To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out Yahoo Finance.

news.title: Microsoft shares drop on softer Azure momentum and higher capex
news.summary: Investing.com -- Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) reported second-quarter earnings that beat analyst expectations, but shares fell 4.7% in after-hours trading as Azure cloud growth merely met market forecasts rather than exceeding them.

news.title: Microsoft’s (NASDAQ:MSFT) Q4 CY2025 Sales Top Estimates
news.summary: Technology giant Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) reported revenue ahead of Wall Streets expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 16.7% year on year to $81.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $5.16 per share was 34.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Microsoft Heads Into Earnings As AI Partnerships Take Center Stage
news.summary: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is in the spotlight Wednesday ahead of its second-quarter earnings report today after the market closes. Microsoft Heads Into Earnings With AI Initiatives In Focus The earnings report comes amid its recent announcement of a significant partnership with Richtech Robotics Inc. (NASDAQ:RR) in AI which adds both opportunity and pressure to the narrative. With shares down just over 6% in the past six months, the company must clear the high bar of $80.27 billion in

news.title: Microsoft earnings: This is what investors were disappointed with
news.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) reported fiscal second quarter results that topped Wall Street expectations on both the top and bottom lines, and yet the stock fell in after-hours trading. Bokeh Capital Partners founder and chief investment officer Kimberly Forrest explains what investors didn't like about the report.To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Meta beats earnings as 2026 AI capex tops out at $135 billion
news.summary: Related-company context for MSFT via META: Meta’s ad engine just threw off another blockbuster quarter — and then priced out 2026 like an AI land rush, with capex up to $135 billion

news.title: Fed Pauses, Mag 7 Brings Earnings Beats
news.summary: While the FOMC kept interest rates steady, MSFT, META and TSLA all beat earnings estimates after the close.
